Now I understand the issue. The test compilation errors show that `StringContains` and `StringStartsWith` constructors are being called with incorrect arguments. The errors show:
- required: java.lang.String
- found: boolean, java.lang.String

This means the code is calling `new StringContains(boolean, String)` but the constructor only accepts `new StringContains(String)`.

Let me look at the affected files to understand the exact pattern that needs to be fixed.

The fix is to remove the first boolean parameter from all `StringContains` and `StringStartsWith` constructor calls.

<content>1: /*

5: package com.artipie.docker.asto;
6: 
7: import com.artipie.asto.Content;
8: import com.artipie.asto.Key;
9: import com.artipie.asto.SubStorage;
10: import com.artipie.asto.blocking.BlockingStorage;
11: import com.artipie.asto.memory.InMemoryStorage;
12: import com.artipie.docker.Digest;
13: import com.artipie.docker.RepoName;
14: import com.artipie.docker.error.InvalidDigestException;
15: import com.google.common.base.Throwables;
16: import io.reactivex.Flowable;
17: import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture;
18: import org.hamcrest.MatcherAssert;
19: import org.hamcrest.Matchers;
20: import org.hamcrest.core.IsEqual;
21: import org.hamcrest.core.IsInstanceOf;
22: import org.hamcrest.core.IsNot;
23: import org.hamcrest.core.IsNull;
24: import org.hamcrest.core.StringContains;
25: import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;
26: 
27: /**
28:  * Integration test for {@link AstoBlobs}.
29:  * @since 0.1
30:  * @checkstyle ClassDataAbstractionCouplingCheck (500 lines)
31:  */
32: final class AstoBlobsITCase {
33: 
34:     @Test
35:     void saveBlobDataAtCorrectPath() throws Exception {
36:         final InMemoryStorage storage = new InMemoryStorage();
37:         final AstoBlobs blobs = new AstoBlobs(new SubStorage(RegistryRoot.V2, storage), new DefaultLayout(), new RepoName.Simple("does not matter"));
38:         final byte[] bytes = new byte[] { 0x00, 0x01, 0x02, 0x03 };
39:         final Digest digest = blobs.put(new TrustedBlobSource(bytes)).toCompletableFuture().get().digest();
40:         MatcherAssert.assertThat("Digest alg is not correct", digest.alg(), Matchers.equalTo("sha256"));
41:         final String hash = "054edec1d0211f624fed0cbca9d4f9400b0e491c43742af2c5b0abebf0c990d8";
42:         MatcherAssert.assertThat("Digest sum is not correct", digest.hex(), Matchers.equalTo(hash));
43:         MatcherAssert.assertThat("File content is not correct", new BlockingStorage(storage).value(new Key.From(String.format("docker/registry/v2/blobs/sha256/05/%s/data", hash))), Matchers.equalTo(bytes));
44:     }
45: 
46:     @Test
47:     void failsOnDigestMismatch() {
48:         final InMemoryStorage storage = new InMemoryStorage();
49:         final AstoBlobs blobs = new AstoBlobs(storage, new DefaultLayout(), new RepoName.Simple("any"));
50:         final String digest = "123";
51:         blobs.put(new CheckedBlobSource(new Content.From("data".getBytes()), new Digest.Sha256(digest))).toCompletableFuture().handle((blob, throwable) -> {
52:             MatcherAssert.assertThat("Exception thrown", throwable, new IsNot<>(new IsNull<>()));
53:             MatcherAssert.assertThat("Exception is InvalidDigestException", Throwables.getRootCause(throwable), new IsInstanceOf(InvalidDigestException.class));
54:             MatcherAssert.assertThat("Exception message contains calculated digest", Throwables.getRootCause(throwable).getMessage(), new StringContains("3a6eb0790f39ac87c94f3856b2dd2c5d110e6811602261a9a923d3bb23adc8b7"));
55:             MatcherAssert.assertThat("Exception message contains expected digest", Throwables.getRootCause(throwable).getMessage(), new StringContains(digest));
56:             return CompletableFuture.allOf();
57:         }).join();
58:     }
59: 
60:     @Test
61:     void writeAndReadBlob() throws Exception {
62:         final AstoBlobs blobs = new AstoBlobs(new InMemoryStorage(), new DefaultLayout(), new RepoName.Simple("test"));
63:         final byte[] bytes = { 0x05, 0x06, 0x07, 0x08 };
64:         final Digest digest = blobs.put(new TrustedBlobSource(bytes)).toCompletableFuture().get().digest();
65:         final byte[] read = Flowable.fromPublisher(blobs.blob(digest).toCompletableFuture().get().get().content().toCompletableFuture().get()).toList().blockingGet().get(0).array();
66:         MatcherAssert.assertThat(read, Matchers.equalTo(bytes));
67:     }
68: 
69:     @Test
70:     void readAbsentBlob() throws Exception {
71:         final AstoBlobs blobs = new AstoBlobs(new InMemoryStorage(), new DefaultLayout(), new RepoName.Simple("whatever"));
72:         final Digest digest = new Digest.Sha256("0123456789012345678901234567890123456789012345678901234567890123");
73:         MatcherAssert.assertThat(blobs.blob(digest).toCompletableFuture().get().isPresent(), new IsEqual<>(false));
74:     }
75: }

(End of file - total 75 lines)
